hotel_name: Khách sạn Big Lào Cai (Big Hotel Lào Cai)

reviews.title: Spent 4 hours no checking. Go to another hotel.
reviews.text:
Agoda should delist this hotel from Agoda website.   I reserve a room for 7 days, and this night, I arrived the building around 6:00pm.   I waited in front this build and nearby cafe (20 meters away) four hours.  Call hotel manager 60+ times, sent check in request through Agoda, sent email through Agoda.    One resident helped me send message to manager through local social media. 
Try all methods in four hours, just get ignored.    No way to check in. 
I left at 10:00pm, nearby cafe close door.   Then, I find and check in another hotel in 11:15pm.   Terrible experience !

reviews.title: Not for good sleep
reviews.positives: Consistent hot water. Good location, 10 mins drive from the Vietnam- china border
reviews.negatives: Bed is terrible. It was super hard to sleep in you feel the big springs on the matress

reviews.title: Made me collect left items from someones room at 11:30pm
reviews.text: The owner/manager is simply lazy. Cleaner hadn't checked the wardrobe so my clothes were still inside it with a new occupant. The owner/manager made me knock on the guys door at night to collect them instead of calling or doing it himself.  He wont even make you a coffee which you'll pay for from the machine in front of him. Place should be shut down. The bathroom also stinks to high heaven and wifi codes are wrong inside rooms. Avoid.

reviews.title: Great value for money, still incomplete though.
reviews.positives: Staff were friendly and helpful, cafe downstairs for coffee and smoothies etc. coi fish pond in the middle of the lobby. Our room was comfortable, clean and well equipped. They have a massage/spa on site.
reviews.negatives: Very new hotel so parts are still under construction. Angle grinding early in the morning, and a big pit to avoid in the lobby. It will be great when its completed.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Phòng cách ồn rất kém, đệm trải tấm lót cao su có in vân hoặc gì đó bên dưới nên nằm không êm ái, không thoải mái

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Bed was on the hard side but I loved the hot shower, AC, mini fridge, fast wifi, smart TV with Netflix and Amazon Prime, balcony overlooking a (tiny) koi pond., elevator, lobby level cafe, etc.  I used Google Translate to communicate with front desk and the girl was EXTREMELY helpful in retrieving something I left on a bus from Hanoi.  For western travellers, it’s a steal.

reviews.title: Thái độ không trung thực
reviews.text: Khách sạn lấy lí do set giá trên web nhầm và bắt khách bù thêm tiền, treo đầu dê bán thịt chó

reviews.title: Ñe
reviews.positives: La cama y el tv
reviews.negatives: Lao Cai

reviews.title: Mid af
reviews.text: There was a diaper in the trashcan. Place is dumpy. It has huge potential but goddamn they do not have their sh*t together. Door locks are crap.

reviews.title: Fort déçue ! Tout était minimaliste alors que la promotion annonce que l’endroit est super… Dommage.
reviews.positives: Pas grand chose
reviews.negatives:
« Big » n’a de grand que le nom…
Accueil minimaliste.
Aucune aide pour porter un bagage.
Juste reçu la clé sans accompagnement à la chambre.
Restaurant (annoncé) fermé. Idem pour la possibilité d’avoir un café au rez de chaussée.

reviews.title: No bath, no coffee shop.
reviews.text: Coffee shop is permanently closed, the room I booked said it had a bath. Which is why I booked this hotel. It didn’t.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hôtel moderne et très bien équipé. Super rapport qualité prix. Bon café au rdv de l hôtel.
reviews.negatives: Pas de the et café à dispo dans la chambre.

reviews.title: The hotel is fairly okay.
reviews.text: KS is under renovation, so it’s dusty. The staff is enthusiastic. There was hot water on the first day, but not on the second day. The bed is uncomfortable. It was hot in the afternoon despite setting the air conditioning to 16 degrees because of the afternoon sun. The prices are low, right in the center.

reviews.title: Bon rapport qualité prix
reviews.positives: Le confort des chambres
reviews.negatives: Le bruit le soir dans la chambre qui venait du bas de l’hôtel. ( personnes qui parlent très fort)

reviews.title: Is a superior double the same as a standard?
reviews.text: The receptionist here reports that the superior and standard rooms are the same type, so please make sure not to confuse them when booking.

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.positives: Chambre propre, personnel souriant, bien situé.
reviews.negatives: Matelas à ressort

reviews.title: Khách sạn mới nhưng cần được cản thiện
reviews.text:
🙂 Khách sạn mới, vị trí thuận tiện, nhân viên thân thiện, giá thành quá rẻ.
🙁 Cần bổ sung nhân viên dọn phòng và cần có planning cho nhân viên dọn phòng để tránh việc khách đến nhận phòng mà phòng chưa được dọn ( 2/4). Quản lý hoặc lễ tân nên kiểm tra phòng trước giờ check-in thay vì ngồi đợi khách đến. Một khách sạn có không gian bên ngoài khá rộng và đẹp nhưng không được trau chút  vệ sinh thì thật là đáng tiếc!  Nên gửi dịch vụ giặt là để chăn ga được phẳng phiu và hạn chế bụi vải  hay tóc còn xót lại khiến khách có cảm giác chăn ga không được thay mặc dù đã được giặt.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Franchement pour 330K impossible de trouver mieux.

reviews.title: Mostly okay.
reviews.text: I have stayed at Big Lao Cai Hotel many times. But why is the room service very poor lately, such as the wifi in the room being unable to connect, then works, then doesn't again, making it impossible for me to get any work done, which is really frustrating. The staff is enthusiastic. If this keeps happening, I will probably choose another hotel for my future stays.

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.positives:
Grande chambre, calme, literie confortable, salle de bain et wifi qui fonctionnent bien.
Hôtel moderne dans le centre-ville.
Accueil souriant et professionnel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The rooms are reasonably priced, located in the center right on a main road, easy to find, and the staff is polite and friendly. However, the downside is that the soundproofing is poor, the ventilation system is very inadequate, and guests in other rooms smoking causes the adjacent rooms to smell of smoke all day, especially room 305. The staff has been informed to remedy this issue.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour
reviews.positives:
Superbe chambre fonctionnelle 
Literie confortable, meubles de qualité, eau bien chaude avec bon débit, bouilloire sèche cheveux, balcon, ascenseur, parking ,rangement c'était parfait
reviews.negatives: Qu'on nous fasse attendre l'heure du check out alors que les chambres étaient prêtes

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Every is great but the WIFI is not so good.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Freundliches Personal. Super Lage. Sehr sauber. Tolles Badezimmer. Großes Zimmer.
reviews.negatives: Der Brunnen in der Lobby ist sehr laut und leider auch nachts im Betrieb. Dadurch, dass die Zimmerfenster zur Lobby ausgerichtet sind stört dies nachts sehr.

reviews.title: It's okay.
reviews.text:
I feel that the hotel has not been upgraded. 
The wifi at the hotel is really not good. 
The room is spacious and clean. 
The staff is friendly. 
Only because of the wifi, I have to book another hotel for my next stay.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sehr gutes Zimmer , ruhig und qualitätsvoll.
reviews.negatives: Die Reception ist sagenhaft kompliziert und sollt sich vor Augen halten, dass sie für die Gäste da ist und nicht für die Bürokratie 😉

reviews.title: It's quite good and inexpensive, excellent.
reviews.text: Great value for the price. The staff is friendly, but I waited a long time in the lobby only to find out they were at the coffee shop next door. I waited for an hour in the hotel lobby. However, I found them working at the coffee shop... The location is ambiguous. Chinese people are smoking nearby. The smell of cigarettes is coming in. There are also a lot of Chinese tourists. It's a good place for solo travelers looking for an affordable stay in a decent hotel. I recommend it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Uno dei due letti era scomodo a causa del materasso, stanza piccola per 4 persone.

reviews.title: okey to stay
reviews.text: okey to  stay

reviews.title: Buono
reviews.positives: Camera pulita, spaziosa e con tutto il necessario. Ottima posizione, vicino a posti per mangiare e per passeggiare.
reviews.negatives: Di notte qualcuno ha suonato l'allarme antincendio, facendoci svegliare di soprassalto.

reviews.title: Nice room
reviews.text: The room was nice. The bed was hard. But this is quite normal for Vietnam. The front desk staff was a little bit difficult to deal with at first, but not horrible.

reviews.title: Blijf hier weg
reviews.positives: Een café in het hotel waar je koffie kon halen.
reviews.negatives: Alles. De ligging, het personeel, de kamer, de bedden, de douche, de golfbaan in het hotel waar je de hele avond last van hebt. De overvloed aan Chinezen in het hotel, wat toch wel benoemd moet worden want een ruimte delen met Chinezen is echt wel een lastig iets.

reviews.title: Good for $11 in Lao Cai
reviews.text: Clean sheets; balcony; water dispenser in lobby; motorbike parking; shower not hot just luke warm; fridge; AC (but a little weak).

reviews.title: Good option for a short stay in Lao Cai

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 服务态度很好，员工热情周到，环境优美。

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The hotel was recently rebuilt so the infra and facilities were excellent. It is located just 10 minutes by car from the center, so if you are looking for a quiet place for your kids then I highly recommend. The Trung Nguyen coffee shop is in the first floor if you want to try the most famous Vietnamese coffee.

reviews.title: The first time
reviews.text: I don't remember much either, but my impression of the first time in the room was that it had a strong smell of medicine, and the mattress with protruding springs was very uncomfortable. However, this is a review of my stay in October; back in November, I was assigned to a room on a different floor, and everything was resolved.

reviews.title: Acceptable

Vị trí khách sạn ngay mặt đường dễ thấy, thuận tiện đi bộ quanh quanh thăm thú, con phố gần khách sạn rất nhiều cửa hàng ăn uống và quần áo.
Chú bảo vệ thân thiện.
Giá phòng không quá đắt.
Có thang máy
reviews.negatives:
Mùi cống của phòng vệ sinh quá nặng, nếu không đóng cửa phòng tắm chắc không ngủ nổi, ban đêm phải mở cửa ban công cho thoáng.
Không có gương bên ngoài, muốn chải chuốt trang điểm phải dùng gương nhà tắm.
Lễ tân không phản ứng kịp khi có nhiều khách tại quầy cùng lúc, hỏi mãi không nhận ra là khách đang hỏi

reviews.title: Great for a night or a week.
reviews.text:
I stayed here last minute after other plans fell through. It was a wonderful surprise. Lao Cai City is a relaxing place to explore.

The staff are delightful and my days were brightened interacting with them. The cafe uses high quality products and they also serve a Bun Cha that was consistently delicious. I had that and a Salt Coffee for breakfast every morning.

There is a large park just north of the hotel with a paved path around a lake. Even though the businesses there are shuttered, the city maintains all of the flowerbeds and the entire park is remarkable gorgeous. It is perfect for reading and exercise. Sunday mornings there are many joggers. There is a cafe on the southside that overlooks the lake.

If I ever return to Lao Cai, I will choose to stay here again.

reviews.title: Czysty, nowy hotel.
reviews.positives: Nowy hotel. Jedna z recepcjonistek dobrze mówiła po angielsku. Kawiarnia obok recepcji. Czysty pokój i łazienka. Ciepła woda pod prysznicem.
reviews.negatives: Brak możliwości oddania rzeczy do prania. Balkon okazał się wychodzić na wewnętrzne patio. Dość słaba izolacja dźwiękowa. W pobliżu brak knajp i możliwości zjedzenia posiłku. W hotelu czuć było wilgoć w powietrzu, słaba wentylacja pokoju i łazienki, póki wszystko jest nowe nie jest to duży problem, ale myślę, że wkrótce pojawi się pleśń.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Everything is good !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wspaniała obsługa, fajne pokoje, super bezpieczny parking!

reviews.title: Good quality hotel at a good price.
reviews.text: I have a trip to Lao Cai and then to Sa Pa early, the location of the hotel is very beautiful, close to the roundabout (intersection) so it's convenient for traveling, the staff is friendly and enthusiastic, the room is clean and welcoming.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Poměr cena a kvalita v naprosto luxusním srovnání.
reviews.negatives: Nechali jsme si vyprat oblečení a bohužel nám nepřišlo vše suché, ale jinak vše super.

reviews.title: Good

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Merkezde  7/24 açık

reviews.title: Tarif correct mais la literie est mauvaise
reviews.text:
Le prix est correct mais les matelas sont à changer de toute urgence 
Nous avons testé deux chambres, une chambre avec deux lits doubles et nous pouvions voir et sentir tous les ressorts et le métal du lit un peu partout dans le matelas, c’est la première fois que je vois ça à ce point-là
Pour la deuxième chambre, c’était un grand lit et ils ont mis un sur matelas car le matelas était mort.
Ce n’est pas confortable du tout et c’est vraiment dommage de la part d’un hôtel de négliger les matelas.
Sur l’ensemble du personnel que nous avons côtoyé une seule employée était sympathique.
Pour ce qui concerne le ménage, beaucoup de poussière et pas de réel, ménage effectué simplement, changement de serviette quand on demande (ils fournissent simplement une grande serviette à personne)
Les bondes au sol se bouchent et les wc également.
Je ne recommande pas cet établissement-là

reviews.title: No m'ha agradat

reviews.negatives: Noméa parlen vietnamita. Gens simpàtics

reviews.title: Perfecte
reviews.positives: L'hotel és perfecte. L'habitació molt còmode i néta. El personal de recepció i de la porta molt atents i agradables. L'ubicació és cèntrica però tranquil·la.
reviews.negatives: L'esmorzar no està inclòs en el preu.

reviews.title: Très bien
reviews.text: Incroyable rapport qualité prix

reviews.title: If you like sleep and flushing toilets maybe not the place for you
reviews.positives: Comfortable bed good tele
reviews.negatives: Toilet didn't flush. Reception playing music and 7.30 nice wake up. And the lift is very loud not a good place for sleeping

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.text: Parfait, parfait, il n’y a pas mieux à lao cai, j’y suis rester une semaine

reviews.title: Fine hotel, crazy payment limitation.
reviews.positives: The stay was fine. Bathroom wasn't really clean but not too shocking either. The room had a bit of a smoking smell. This was fine for one night, definitely nothing more than fine though.
reviews.negatives:
Very odd I could ONLY pay in EXACT cash. The receptionist told me it's the only way to pay. Card is not accepted and he couldn't give change back(!).

How is it possible to ONLY accept cash, AND NOT HAVE CASH FOR CHANGE?! Honestly feels like an outright scam.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
dss erwähnte reichhaltige frühstücksbuffet existiert nicht!!!
undere wäsche war am nächsten tag nicht gewaschen und an unserem abreisetag kriegten wir sie erst auf mehrmaliges nachfragen, auch die bitte die wäsche auf‘s zimmer zu bringen, kam man nicht nach. fas superior zimmer hatte die fenster nicht zur strasse hin und wsr auch keine 25qm gross.

reviews.title: Soulless hotel, good if you’re passing through
reviews.positives: The room itself was comfortable with a good powerful hot shower. We loved that each room has a balcony and a smart tv.
reviews.negatives: The hotel itself was a bit soulless. It’s very big and didn’t see many other people staying, there isn’t a restaurant on site and they also don’t serve snacks which is difficult as it’s quite far away from restaurants. The cafe on site looked abandoned. Room wasn’t clean, wouldn’t have used the glassware as they were so dirty. We went to the roof Terrance which was nice but there wasn’t any seats up there!

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel
reviews.text: Leicht zugänglich, Zimmer ist in Ordnung, nur die Eingangstür/Aussicht auf das Hotel ist enttäuschend, die Rezeption findet nur an einem Tisch statt, schade

reviews.title: The bed's mattress ruined the whole experience
reviews.positives: Friendly and helpful staff. Nice hotel that looks new. The room is basic but that was totally faire according to the price.
reviews.negatives:
Terrible mattress... I felt the springs in it and had a back pain in the morning. Totally unusual for that kind of place.
Also, no bath soap and shampoo (jar hadn't been refiled).

reviews.title: Everything good
reviews.text: The hotel is amazing, clean, warm, comfy.

reviews.title: It's okay, but the staff should be more respectful towards people
reviews.positives: Good location, good repair, good design of the hotel, hot water works well. Very clean.
reviews.negatives:
The girl at the reception refused to let us into the room we booked until 2pm, saying it was unavailable/occupied. Although it turned out it was free, as were the other rooms. This behavior was extremely disappointing and spoils the impression of this place.

The hotel had work areas (coworking, conference room), but we were denied use, or these areas were closed. The room is quite small for two people. Otherwise, everything is fine.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Hot shower with strong pressure. Bed was comfy and clean. Table and stool provided. Balcony overlooking the fish pond was cool. Value for money for a relatively clean room in the city.
reviews.negatives: Blanket provided was quite thin, almost like another bedsheet. There is no floor mat to dry feet after using the toilet. Hotel is still under construction so from around sunrise to sunset there will be construction noise. There is a constant smell of cigarettes near the doorway, it's gone once the aircon is turned on.

reviews.negatives: We didn't have breakfast maybe due to the factor that the hotel was just opened, but stuff recommended few placex to eat nearby.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Không thể chấp nhận được cách pv của nv ở đây khi khách nhận phòng thiếu nước, thiếu dép, thiếu khăn tắm. Khi khách báo lễ tân thì dửng dưng trả lời khách là "pv buồng họ bỏ vậy thì e k biết, e k có dép bổ sung". Qly cần xem lại cách vận hành các khâu, khi khách đặt phòng có mấy người thì vật dụng p đủ ít nhất cho từng đó người. Nếu thiếu, khi khách hỏi p xin lỗi và bổ sung đủ cho khách. K thể dửng dưng trả lời vậy cho xong chuyện đc

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Nv phục vụ quá tệ, thuê phòng gia đình 4NL ở mà để thiếu khăn, thiếu nc, thiếu dép. Nhg khi gọi lễ tân thì lễ tân bảo hết dép, nc và khăn là do pv buồng. Tôi ở 2 đêm mùng 1 tết và mùng 5 tết, tôi đều k hài lòng cả 2 đêm, vì cả 2 đêm đều thiếu đồ như nhau, k có chút rút kinh nghiệm để đón tiếp, lễ tân k nhiệt tình, như muốn đuổi khách. Chưa khi nào tôi thuê phòng mà k hài lòng như lần này, lại đúng đầu năm m1 tết. Việc buồng hay lễ tân qly đồ, khách k cần biết, chỉ thấy thiếu thì hỏi lễ tân, ntn thì lễ tân p có trách nhiệm, chứ k thể đổ tại pv buồng và k bổ sung đồ thiếu cho khách đc. Nếu thực sự lễ tân chỉ làm việc nhận/trả phòng thì qly cần xem lại các khâu. Vì khách nhận phòng tối và sáng sớm đi, nhg tôi cg p trả tiền nguyên cả 1 ngày, tại sao giờ đó nói pv buồng nghỉ nên k lấy được đồ đủ cho khách?

reviews.text: Pěkný hotel zadobrou cenu, mohli jsme si uschovat zavazadla po check out

reviews.title: 沒有一個好
reviews.text: 櫃檯小姐不太理人之外，態度不良。入住四人房，我和先生一坐下去，床馬上垮掉+斷掉。櫃檯請保全來修理。我們跟小孩等半天。我下去跟櫃檯說是否可以換一間房間，我們只是要睡午覺和沖澡，等待晚上的夜舖火車。多給了一間都是灰塵的地板，馬桶沖水不良。一堆螞蟻在地上。地點也非常不方便⋯沒有一個好的。
